text: Being here, I sense a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The first scene, with its modern glass walls and focused discussions, evokes a feeling of thoughtful purpose—a space dedicated to creation and sharing of ideas. The second space, vibrant and bold with 'R+D' emblazoned on the wall, amplifies this sense of innovation. I feel inspired, as though every surface urges me to ponder the future, to question how humans and technology interweave meaningfully. There is excitement in the air, and I am drawn to reflect on my own role in the evolving tapestry of thought and creation.
